Our Story

Where it all started

Every story has a beginning. Ours started with a moment that seemed ordinary at the time, but quietly changed everything.

unggoy ✨

Cai

Sent one message about a guessed clue and never really stopped talking to you since.

❤️
si tropa pala to ih 💖

Rina

Guessed the clue, confessed first, been with me ever since. (it was her all along)

"kunwari nag chat lang as tropa—pero pare mahal na pala kita"

✨ 💕 💗 ✨ 🌸 🌷
Our Story

How we got here

Every story has a beginning. Ours started with a simple moment that neither of us knew would change everything.

💗
💓
Chapter One · The First Hello
Oct 12, 2022 · 9:50 PM

The clue gets guessed

A message on Messenger about a crush's identity. You guessed wrong at first. It was you the whole time.

💬 it was you the whole time
Chapter Two · Becoming "Friends"
Oct 18, 2022 · 9:51 PM

You went first

Weeks of talking, and you confessed before I could work up the nerve to.

💬 braver than me, always
Chapter Three · The Moment Everything Changed
Oct 19, 2022

I went second (barely)

One phone call to Raye and Andrei for advice later, I confessed back. Best decision made under peer pressure, ever.

🌟 been different ever since
Chapter Four · Saying Yes
Nov 16, 2022

You said yes to being courted

Officially on the record: you agreed to let me try.

💖 the record shows it. you said yes.
💌
Chapter Five · Our First Official Date
Jul 19, 2023

Official

The date everything since has been counted from. Best yes you've ever given me.

💕 the day the counter started
Chapter Six · Still Us
Jul 19, 2026

Three years

Still here, still us, still your biggest fan.

🌹 to be continued, always

And before we knew it, our story was already writing its next page…

✨ 🌹 ✨

Looking back, I realized these years gave me more than memories—they quietly taught me lessons I'll carry for the rest of my life.

For Rina
💌
🌸
To Rina

Happy 3rd anniversary!!

Three years in, and it still feels like the best decision I've ever made. Thank you for all the warmth, chances, care, love, and every version of "yes" you've given me since. I'll make sure you receive everything you deserve, lovelove. As hard as we try to avoid hardships, it'll be impossible. We've been through some that tested our relationship, changed us, and made us realize that moving forward there will be more. Knowing that this will be what's happening, I'll always be there for you, my love. Holding you tightly close to me, and making sure you're not alone, that you'll never be alone again in this cruel world. I'm always here to be your everything—may it be your number one fan, ka-chika, friend, someone you can rest in and confide in, and mostly your partner in life. I'll care for you and love you 'til the last of my breath, rina.

still yours, Cai
I miss you so much, my lovelove. i hope you enjoy this gift. (づ ᴗ ⩊ᴗ)づ🎁

made this for you, with a lot of love (and a little bit of code) ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)

This isn't the end of our story.

It's simply the last page of this scrapbook… until we make the next one.
